routes.description: Start from same start as Gorilla. Instead of topping out left, go right.

routes.name: Flappy bird
routes.description: Start compressed on two side pulls and dyno to a jug on the lip.

routes.name: Ypopto to aisthima sou
routes.description: Sit start on the juggy ledge and climb up and left through crimps to reach the pockets and topout with caution.

routes.name: Therapy 101
routes.description: Sit start and make some dynamic moves to get to the pockets above on the vertical face

routes.name: Diporto
routes.description: Sit start on the same ledge as ‘Ypopto to aisthima sou’ and make your way straight up instead of left

routes.name: Chalk ‘n shoes
routes.description:
Added by
Vasiliki Anastasiou

routes.name: Crater
routes.description: Climb out of the right side of the cave, using the large features.

routes.name: The Crow
routes.description: Climb the left side of the overhang without using the left arete.

routes.name: Quite Nice
routes.description: Start on the undercut and crimp to gain a good sloper out right and below, before climbing out of the overhang to finish direct.

routes.name: Pumba
routes.description: Start on the undercut LH and gaston RH to gain the flat flake beyond the mini roof and top out.

routes.name: The Surf
routes.description: Climb up through sidepulls to make a somewhat committing move to a good hold before toping out with ease.

routes.name: Troglodyte
routes.description: Climb out of the centre of the cave to gain the good hold on the lip and top out (crux).

routes.name: Wavelength
routes.description: An eliminate but climbs well: sds on the good sidepull on the corner, to traverse to the left along the lip but without using any of the good holds above the break, including the flat flake used on "Pumba".

routes.name: Apodrasi
routes.description: Climb up through slopers and edges to the same top-out as “The Crow”.

routes.name: Bombora
routes.description: Make a running jump to gain the good ledge. Really fun!

routes.name: Catching Waves
routes.description: Start LH on the side pull crimp (crack) and RH on the slanted crimp Dyno to the good jug on the lip. Super fun!

routes.name: Maelstrom
routes.description: Start LH in the undercut and RH on the gaston (like ‘Pumpa’) and dyno straight to the jug used for ‘Bombora’ & ‘Catching Waves’

routes.name: Seismic Wave
routes.description: A left-to-right traverse of the pocketed cave, starting at "The Crow" and finishing up "The Crater".

routes.name: Orion
routes.description: SS on the plinth (rock platform) underneath the overhanging flake and climb to the top along the lip, pumpy.

routes.name: Zero gravity
routes.description:
Added by
Christos Sophocleous

routes.name: Spacewalk
routes.description: SS to get established on the slab and finish direct.

routes.name: Laika
routes.description: SS to get established on the slab and finish direct.

routes.name: Albert
routes.description: SS to get established on the slab and finish direct.

routes.name: Apollo 13
routes.description: Start standing to move up through undercuts.

routes.name: Lagrange
routes.description: Stand Start using the flake to move up direct.

routes.name: Mars
routes.description: Start standing to get established on the slab and move up direct.

routes.name: Gluth
routes.description: Sit start like ‘Beer Belly’ and make your way up and right and finish up ‘Skembe’

routes.name: Skembe
routes.description: Using the good holds make your way up the wide crack line

routes.name: Skembe (sds)
routes.description: Sit start to ‘Skembe’ start from the low black pocket down low

routes.name: Patchwerk
routes.description: Stand start using the two main holds and make a powerful move right and top out the crack. Careful as it is quite mossy

routes.name: No Pads Needed
routes.description: (Do put mats)

routes.name: Beer belly
routes.description: Sit-start on the left of Underbelly going straight up on pockets and crimps.

routes.name: Love Handle
routes.description: Nice traverse on jugs

routes.name: Stretch Marks
routes.description: Sit-start with awkward mantle in the beginning, which goes into an easy vertical climb.

routes.name: Cleanup Job
routes.description: Sit-start with good holds

routes.name: Underbelly
routes.description: Stand start on the big hole and traverse left all the way until you reach the main starting hold of ‘Skembe’

routes.name: Fatboy Slim
routes.description: Sit start like ‘Beer Belly’ and make your way diagonally right to the black face with a series of small crimps until you reach the big hole and top out. (The crack on the right is out)

routes.name: Get in ma belly
routes.description: Elimination but climbs really well. Sit start on pockets and climb direct without veering left to the black face. None of the black face holds are in including the pockets.

routes.name: Core Belly
routes.description: Match star from diagonal crack. Sit start. Feet walk on the lower level until the end. Top out like Love Handle

routes.name: Omicron lives inside me
routes.description: Start in the back of the little cave. Traverse along a horizontal break/crack in the base of the roof, make a couple of strenuous moves past the lip of the roof and top-out up the vertical pockety wall.

routes.name: Covid Christmas
routes.description: Climb the diagonal flakey crack line in the center of the wall, using any of the many options for hands and feet.

routes.name: Afkolemoni
routes.description: A slightly harder problem on the right of the face, again with many options of pockets and a thin diagonal crack.

routes.name: Softball
routes.description: Sit start at the far left of the face and climb up through as series of nice holds.

routes.name: High on Mushrooms
routes.description: Sit start and climb up a series of many options for jugs and positive slopers.

routes.name: Middle Man
routes.description: Really nice line that starts as a sit-start in the middle of the face and climbs a series of large protruding side-pulls that give some nice technical movement.

routes.name: Oasis
routes.description: Sit-start on the right of "Middle Man" and climb straight up.

routes.name: Downtime
routes.description: Sit-start on the far right of the face and climb straight up.

routes.name: Lowball
routes.description: Excellent low traverse from right to left and topping out on the far left at "Softball".

routes.name: Night Blindness
routes.description: Sit-start on the right of the shelf/ledge and make some delicate moves through a series of sidepulls and edges.

routes.name: Who shot the sheriff?
routes.description: Start standing with right hand on a 3 finger half-pad crimp and a left gaston edge, to eventually gain a diagonal crimp rail and top out with good use of footwork.

routes.name: Sweet spot
routes.description: Make a jumping/french start to a good pocket jug and then top out.

routes.name: Ach-Eli's Heel
routes.description: Start sited below the little roof and get established on the slab and top out. Alternatively traverse all the way left without using the top lip for a 6A+.

routes.name: To Volema
routes.description: Sit start matched on the big ledge and make your way up right

routes.name: Avoli
routes.description: Sit start using the crack and traverse left with a tricky sequence before doing an easy top out

routes.name: Wildlife
routes.description: Stand start at the juggy part of the crimpy rail at the back of the cave and make a few moves before a big move to the slot and then to the fin, finish straight up using the arête

routes.name: Damnation
routes.description: Start low to the right on obvious jug. Traverse over to the left on good holds to get to the ledge. Hard move over the ledge into slab finish. Top out traversing to the right (easy highball topout with bad landing)

routes.name: Wookiee Whisper
routes.description:
Added by
Demetris Papakyriacou

routes.name: Mini Chewie
routes.description: Sit start and climb through positive edges/sidepulls.

routes.name: Ewok's Echo
routes.description:
Added by
Demetris Papakyriacou

routes.name: Yub Nub
routes.description:
Added by
Demetris Papakyriacou

routes.name: Ewok Odyssey
routes.description: Extension of "Ewok's Escape", starting around the arete on the other side and traversing all the way to topout at "Ewok's Arete".

routes.name: Ewok Arete
routes.description: Climb the short arete from a sit start.

routes.name: Bacca
routes.description: Climb up from sit-start without the arete.

routes.name: Ewok's Spear
routes.description: Climb the arete from a sit start and mantle at its top.

routes.name: Ewok Escape
routes.description: Sit start around the arete with a left hand on a slopey jug and get around the arete (careful not to dab) to finish same as "Ewok's Spear".

routes.name: Eglepe re Chewie jai enna petasumen tora
routes.description: Sit-start on the slopey jug to mantle straight onto the slab.

routes.name: Kirie Zolo fakka mas o destroyer!!
routes.description: Sit start on the slopey jug and make a long reach out left to mantle on the slab.

routes.name: Yub
routes.description:
Added by
Demetris Papakyriacou

routes.name: Dichotomy
routes.description: Climb up the using the arête and pockets. As the name implies, it’s quite mossy.

routes.name: Dichotomy Direct
routes.description: Straightforward climb using the pockets and the nonchalant mossy crack until the good top out jugs (Sit start is also an option)

routes.name: Duality
routes.description: Sit start using two crimps. Obtain big pocket and dyno to the top. Quite fun!

routes.name: Enrique Kypresias
routes.description: Wall run. Topping out the same as ‘Duality’

routes.name: Shinto
routes.description: Sit start a little bit to the right of ‘Duality’ on two crimps. Make a big move to the hole pocket and then advance to the big hole topping the same as 'Harmony Direct'

routes.name: Harmony Direct
routes.description: Start below the big hole and advance directly up.

routes.name: Harmony
routes.description: Veers slightly right from ‘Harmony Direct’ for an easier finish with the pockets/jugs.

routes.name: Taiji
routes.description: Sit start using good holds to obtain crimps. Stand start hovers around 5+

routes.name: Zou Yan
routes.description: Sit start low in the small cave with both hands on the undercling and make big powerful moves to the big jug and then top out. Try to not dab!

routes.name: Confucius
routes.description: Same start as 'Shinto', traverse along right without using the top edges and top out at 'Zou Yan.'

routes.name: Tradality
routes.description: Static version of Duality using big pocket as undercut.

routes.name: Zol
routes.description: Sit Start on the right under the big hole using the small crack on the right and traverse left.

routes.name: Light of the Temple
routes.description: Start low with both hands on the ledge. Heel hook your way around and traverse along the boulder without using any top edges. Finish on the rock on the far right.

routes.name: Fuxi
routes.description: Sit start on the rail jug and heel hook up left on the ledge.. Sit start using the rail jug and use a heel hook to come up and left to top out

routes.name: Nuwa
routes.description: Same beginning as ‘Fuxi’ but goes direct up. Same start as 'Fuxi' but go directly up

routes.name: Shennong
routes.description: Sit start. Start with crimp with the right hand and undercling with the left. Line tops out a little to the right of ‘Nuwa’

routes.name: Yijing
routes.description: Sit start on two crimpers and push and pull to stand up and top out directly above

routes.name: Juxtaposition
routes.description: Sit start using good foot holds to stand up and top out

routes.name: Heresy
routes.description: Sit start using a sloper with the left and a crimp with the right hand to establish a position for an easier ending.

routes.name: Temple of the Light
routes.description: Reverse Traverse of 'Light of the Temple.'  Start on the small rock and traverse all the way around (without using any of the top edges of the boulder) topping out just after going around the arête the same as 'Nuwa'.

routes.name: Tao
routes.description: Sit start with both hands on the thin side-pull flake and explode to the right hand gaston for an easy finish. Short but packs a punch! (Harder for the tall)

routes.name: The Whale
routes.description: Sit start out right at the juggy hole and traverse left along the lip/arete feature all the way to the top of the arete.

routes.name: Vertigo
routes.description: Start sited low under the overhang and climb up through large flakes/jugs.

routes.name: Decompression
routes.description: Start sited on the large juggy hole, mantle on the face and then walk up the slab.

routes.name: Shallow
routes.description: Sit start in the large hole and mantle up the slab to finish up this.

routes.name: Riha einai re mbeite
routes.description: Start at the hole of "Shallow" and traverse low through jugs, to reach two pockets (without dubbing) and topping out there.

routes.name: Makrovouti
routes.description: Same as "Riha einai re mbeite", but traverse further and top out just before the large scoop (starting hold of "The Whale").
